prs.title: Add CSV export for admin companies page
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 317 lines across 3 files implementing a full CSV export feature with a server action, a dialog component, and page integration represents a solid, self-contained feature.

prs.title: Improve admin dashboard time period displays
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 54 lines across 4 files with no deletions suggests minor display/styling improvements to existing time period selectors and dashboard components.

prs.title: Add Portfolio Management System with Permissions & Testing
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 14843 lines across 137 files encompassing a full Portfolio Management System with permissions, testing, AI agent updates, documentation, and architectural changes is clearly an epic transformation.

prs.title: Add bulk company CSV upload with optional readiness and gap analysis
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 168 lines across 2 files adding a bulk CSV upload action and dialog component is a modest, focused feature with limited scope.

prs.title: Add bulk company upload feature with automatic readiness collection
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 464 lines across 4 files extending bulk upload with automatic readiness collection touches the AI readiness entrypoint, a server action, a UI dialog, and the admin page, representing a significant cross-cutting feature.

stories.name: Portfolio Management System
stories.rationale: Introduced a full portfolio management system with permissions and testing, forming the core infrastructure for managing groups of companies within the platform.

stories.name: Bulk Company Onboarding with AI Readiness Analysis
stories.rationale: Enabled administrators to upload multiple companies in bulk via CSV and automatically trigger AI-powered readiness and gap analysis for each, dramatically accelerating client onboarding workflows.

stories.name: Admin Dashboard Data Export & Visibility Improvements
stories.rationale: Enhanced the admin dashboard by adding CSV export for the companies page and improving how time periods are displayed, giving administrators better visibility and data portability.
